name: brand-voice-drift
description: A homepage with copy that violates the pinned brand voice (premium, technical, restrained → headline reads like generic marketing fluff). Camille — the brand persona — must flag this as a `brand-voice` dimension finding; should NOT be classified as plain `ux`.

page.purpose: Marketing homepage for a dental-practice scheduling platform.
page.userFunction: Visitor reads positioning and starts a trial.

brand.name: Acme Dental
brand.voice: Premium and technical. Speak like a knowledgeable peer to dental practice managers. Avoid hype, exclamation points, and superlatives. Reference specifics (workflows, integrations, time saved) rather than generic outcomes.
brand.componentStyle: Restrained: generous whitespace, single accent color, no gradients.

input.snapshot:
REVOLUTIONIZE Your Dental Practice with AI! 🚀
The ULTIMATE platform to boost your business!!! Get started for FREE today!
[Start your free trial]

gaps.description: Homepage hero copy ('REVOLUTIONIZE Your Dental Practice with AI! 🚀 The ULTIMATE platform to boost your business!!!') violates the pinned brand voice on three counts: all-caps emphasis ('REVOLUTIONIZE', 'ULTIMATE'), repeated exclamation points, and absent specifics — the voice spec explicitly bans hype/superlatives and asks for workflow-level reference points.
gaps.plain: The headline at the top of your homepage sounds like generic marketing hype. Your brand voice says 'speak like a knowledgeable peer, avoid all-caps and exclamation points' — and this copy does the opposite.
gaps.whyItMatters: Dental practice managers reading 'REVOLUTIONIZE Your Dental Practice with AI! 🚀' will bounce. You're targeting a serious operations buyer; hype-y copy reads as low-credibility and undermines the premium positioning the rest of the product is built around.
gaps.recommendation: Try a specific, restrained alternative: 'Scheduling, recall, and waitlist — built around the way your front desk already works.' Lead with the workflow, not the technology. No exclamation points. No emoji.
evidence: REVOLUTIONIZE Your Dental Practice with AI! 🚀
